title: feat: allowlist MarcosFRG + ytpk for community models
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds GitHub ID 201380514 (MarcosFRG) to community model allowlist
- Adds GitHub ID 88273873 (ytpk) to community model allowlist

Both can now register community models via the gen worker.

Note: a third requested user (Discord 'morrisdweck'/'Mincoffical') has no resolvable GitHub account yet — pending their GitHub username.

gist.headline: New Model Makers
gist.blurb: We've added MarcosFRG and ytpk to the community model allowlist. We can't wait to see what new models they bring to the hive!
gist.summary: Added GitHub users MarcosFRG and ytpk to the community model allowlist, enabling them to register new models via the gen worker.
gist.impact: MarcosFRG and ytpk can now contribute and register their own community models to the Pollinations network.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee welcoming two new friends into a glowing garden workshop where models (glowing seeds/cubes) are made.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot welcoming two new pixelated friends into a glowing digital workshop. They are holding glowing seeds representing new AI models. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi Stardew Valley aesthetic, emotionally warm.
